narration: This process is called transpiration pull, and it’s more fascinating than you think.

narration: When water evaporates from leaves, it creates a vacuum.

ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When water evaporates from leaves, it creates a vacuum.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When water evaporates from leaves, it creates a vacuum.

narration: This vacuum helps pull more water from roots to leaves, sustaining the plant.
